name: dev-kit-experience-capture
description: Distill and package developer session experience into persistent repository assets. Captures patterns, skills, and agent memories.

sections.title: Packaging Tiers
bullets: Memory: Agent context in integration templates.

sections.title: Typical Workflow
bullets: Plan: Identify key takeaways from the engineering session.

Process: Execute capture workflow and sync AI agents.
